name: rag-offline-example-v1
description: Small deterministic fixture suite for smoke-testing the RAG evaluation harness.

cases.question: When is Project Atlas scheduled to launch?

fixture.answer: Project Atlas is scheduled to launch on 15 September 2026.
contexts: The approved Project Atlas launch date is 15 September 2026 after the final readiness review.
The project team directory lists the Atlas engineering and operations contacts.

cases.question: How many remote working days are available each week?

fixture.answer: Employees may work remotely for up to three days per week.
contexts: The flexible working policy permits employees to work remotely for up to three days per week.

cases.question: How long are encrypted production backups retained?

fixture.answer: Encrypted production backups are retained for 30 days.
contexts: Production backups are encrypted at rest and retained for 30 days before automatic deletion.
